'''âb-f-w-b''' ('''kabafweboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ladderize|ladderize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ladderize|ladderize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-f-w-b
|-
! Lemma
| kabafweboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibafweboko|thibafweboko]] || [[word:jibafweboko|jibafweboko]] || [[word:shibafweboko|shibafweboko]] || [[word:kibafweboko|kibafweboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabafweboko|thabafweboko]] || [[word:jabafweboko|jabafweboko]] || [[word:shabafweboko|shabafweboko]] || [[word:kabafweboko|kabafweboko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
